tier.description: Root tier (most simplified). Children tiers hold more detail. Only leaf tiers contain edges and relevant_files.

nodes.title: React HUD Frontend
nodes.description: Browser-based React 19 and TypeScript frontend that hosts the glassmorphic HUD, voice interaction controls, streamed audio playback, transcript panel, authentication gate, and draggable widgets.

tier.description: Leaf tier for frontend details. Edges may point to nodes in other tiers.

nodes.title: Application Entry and Auth Shell
nodes.description: Initializes the React app under AuthProvider and gates the main HUD behind Supabase authentication state.

nodes.title: Voice Session Client
nodes.description: Manages browser-side speech input, WebSocket transport to the backend, streamed assistant text, streamed audio chunks, reconnection behavior, and voice session state.

nodes.title: Supabase Client Configuration
nodes.description: Creates the Supabase client from Vite environment variables and fails fast if required values are missing.

nodes.title: ElevenLabs Scribe STT Capture
nodes.description: Captures microphone input using ElevenLabs Scribe realtime STT with VAD auto-commit, sends committed transcripts to the backend, and displays partial transcript previews.

nodes.title: FastAPI Voice Pipeline Backend
nodes.description: Python 3.12 backend serving STT token and WebSocket endpoints, orchestrating Gemini reasoning, tool execution, streaming TTS, and widget payload resolution.

tier.description: Second tier for backend details. Includes one proof-of-concept third-tier expansion.

nodes.title: HTTP and WebSocket API
nodes.description: Exposes /scribe-token for ElevenLabs realtime STT authorization and /ws for multiplexed transcript, text, audio, tool, widget, and done messages.

tier.description: Proof-of-concept third tier expanding one backend component.

nodes.title: Transcript Noise Filtering
nodes.description: Rejects empty, very short, and parenthetical STT noise transcripts before invoking the voice pipeline.

nodes.title: Gemini Reasoning and Tool Loop
nodes.description: Maintains conversation history, streams Gemini 2.5 Flash responses, executes manual function calls for up to five rounds, and feeds tool responses back into the model.

nodes.title: Text Streaming and ElevenLabs TTS
nodes.description: Streams Gemini text chunks to the frontend, chunks complete sentences to ElevenLabs TTS over WebSocket, and forwards base64 audio chunks back to the client.

nodes.title: Widget Resolver and Formatter
nodes.description: Chooses one tool result to visualize and converts tool outputs into frontend widget payload schemas.
